name: Renforth Resources, Inc.
description: Renforth Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on advancing a portfolio of gold and critical mineral assets. The company is primarily centered on the Cadillac Break in Quebec, where it is developing the Parbec gold deposit and the Victoria polymetallic deposit, which contains nickel, cobalt, platinum, palladium, and other metals. Additionally, Renforth holds the Nixon-Bartleman gold property in Ontario. All of the company's assets are wholly owned, and it is publicly traded on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol RFR.
